stemHtml: Which statement about CG limits is correct?

options.a: The forward CG limit is mainly determined by the amount of pitch control available from the elevator.
options.b: If the aft CG limit is correctly chosen, the forward CG limit is automatically determined as well.
options.c: The forward CG limit is determined by stability considerations only.
options.d: The aft CG limit is determined by the maximum elevator deflection available.
